agent_record.pref_name: Cyril, Saint, Bishop of Jerusalem, approximately 315-386

rel_con.label: Cyril, Saint, Bishop of Jerusalem, approximately 315-386
Cyril, Saint, Bishop of Jerusalem, approximately 315-386
Cyril, Saint, Bishop of Jerusalem, approximately 315-386. Catecheses
Cyril, Saint, Bishop of Jerusalem, approximately 315-386. | Catecheses

note: Previously unknown recension of the Catecheses of Cyril of Jerusalem; not related to the version in Codex Sinaiticus Rescriptus St. Petersburg/Oslo/Sinai, MS i

bib.citation: Müller-Kessler, Christa. “Neue Palimpsestfragmente zu den Katechesen des Cyrill von Jerusalem im Codex Sinaiticus Rescriptusi (Georg. NF 19, 71) mit einem zweiten Textzeugen (Syr. NF 11) aus dem Fundus des St. Katherinenklosters.” Oriens Christianus 104 (2021): 25-66

cataloguer.message: Description and identification of undertexts as part of SPP (2011-2016). Migrated to SMDL in 2025.

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.
